name: Python 3.13
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y iptables ipset dnsutils aggregate && pip install uv && uv tool install llm && llm install llm-github-models llm-anthropic llm-gemini && llm models default github/gpt-4.1 && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code rust-just && go install github.com/charmbracelet/glow/v2@latest && sudo /workspaces/safer-codespace/.devcontainer/init-firewall.sh
